extension.summary: Combined Stream Cinema and CSFD rankings in one addon
Kombinovany Stream Cinema a CSFD rebricek v jednom addone
Kombinovany Stream Cinema a CSFD zebricek v jednom addonu
extension.description: All-in-one Lolop CS addon: Stream Cinema sources sorted by CSFD plus full CSFD rankings (movies, series, seasons) with year filter. Powers skin.lolop.cs without needing two separate addons.
All-in-one Lolop CS addon: Stream Cinema zdroje zoradene podla CSFD plus plne CSFD rebricky (filmy, serialy, serie) s filtrom od roku. Pohana skin.lolop.cs bez potreby dvoch samostatnych addonov.
All-in-one Lolop CS addon: Stream Cinema zdroje serazene podle CSFD plus plne CSFD zebricky (filmy, serialy, serie) s filtrem od roku. Pohani skin.lolop.cs bez potreby dvou samostatnych addonu.
extension.news: v1.0.0 (2026-04-25) - Initial release combining plugin.video.kolop and plugin.video.csfd-rebricek into a single addon - Provides both CSFD-sorted Stream Cinema sources and full CSFD ranking browsing - Powers skin.lolop.cs so only one addon is required instead of two
